title: Trane Technologies (TT) Gains 28% in a Year: Here's How

title: U.S. Department of Labor Registers National Trane Technologies Technician Apprenticeship Program
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, is proud to announce its Technician Apprenticeship Program (TAP) has received national registration from the U.S. Department of Labor, accrediting the program as a pathway for robust on-the-job training and quality, high-paying careers as Trane® Commercial HVAC service technicians. Requiring no prior experience or training and designed for scale, the four-year, paid instruction program will attract and.

title: Trane Technologies (TT) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why
text: Trane Technologies (TT) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: Trane Technologies (TT) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: Trane Technologies (TT) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Trane Technologies (TT) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.68 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.55 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.16 per share a year ago.

title: Trane Technologies Reports Strong Results and Raises 2023 Revenue and EPS Guidance
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today reported diluted earnings per share (EPS) from continuing operations of $2.57 for the second quarter of 2023. Adjusted continuing EPS was $2.68, up 24 percent.
